results.title: Car vs. lollipop: Wild confrontation caught on dashcam
Ram Charan’s ‘peddi’ Opens At Rs 135 Crore Worldwide
results.description: Ram Charan-starrer Peddi delivered a blockbuster opening, grossing Rs 135 crore worldwide on day one, driven by strong Telugu market and overseas demand.
